instructions: Prioritize auth correctness, request-bounds safety, race conditions, and backwards-compatible MCP behavior. Favor composable React APIs and Next.js 16 app-router best practices.

customRules.tagline: Bardo repository safety and quality rules
rules: Do not trust caller-supplied user identifiers for privileged mutations; derive identity from verified auth context.
Do not accept API keys from query parameters unless BARDO_ALLOW_QUERY_API_KEY is explicitly true.
All MCP handlers must enforce bounded request size and return structured JSON errors.
Do not log secrets, API keys, or customer workspace paths in server logs.
Prefer composable component variants over boolean-prop proliferation in React UI components.
intents: Flag vulnerabilities and auth bypass opportunities before style nitpicks.
Call out maintainability regressions and hidden coupling in app/router and MCP modules.
